title: Zebkit zbk-transition Token Overrides
description: Authorable overrides for the zbk-transition token module.

durationToken.description: Default duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

cubicBezierToken.description: Playful motion (spatial) default timing curve. Use for movement and layout-related transitions where a lively, expressive settle feels appropriate.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

scale.description: Fluid-scale controls for this module (e.g. min-viewport/max-viewport/min-base/max-base/min-ratio/max-ratio on font-size, max-scale on spacing).

default.description: Default duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

slow.description: Slower duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

fast.description: Faster duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

motion-function-default.description: Playful motion (spatial) default timing curve. Use for movement and layout-related transitions where a lively, expressive settle feels appropriate.

motion-function-slow.description: Playful motion (spatial) slow timing curve. Use for larger, more noticeable movement where you want a longer, expressive ease into the final position without feeling abrupt.

motion-function-fast.description: Playful motion (spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick movement that still feels springy and characterful—snappy, but not rigid.

motion-duration-default.description: Playful motion (spatial) default duration. Pairs with the playful motion default curve for common movement transitions.

motion-duration-slow.description: Playful motion (spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the playful motion slow curve for larger or more prominent movement transitions.

motion-duration-fast.description: Playful motion (spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful motion fast curve for quick spatial transitions that should still feel expressive.

fx-function-default.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) default timing curve. Use for opacity, color, shadow, blur, and other visual effects where overshoot is not appropriate.

fx-function-slow.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) slow timing curve. Use for slower fades and effect changes that should feel smooth and deliberate without bounce.

fx-function-fast.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick effect transitions that should feel responsive but still smooth.

fx-duration-default.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) default duration. Pairs with the playful effects default curve for common fades and visual effect transitions.

fx-duration-slow.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the playful effects slow curve for more noticeable fades or effect changes.

fx-duration-fast.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful effects fast curve for subtle, quick visual updates.

function-default.description: Playful motion (spatial) default timing curve. Use for movement and layout-related transitions where a lively, expressive settle feels appropriate.

function-slow.description: Playful motion (spatial) slow timing curve. Use for larger, more noticeable movement where you want a longer, expressive ease into the final position without feeling abrupt.

function-fast.description: Playful motion (spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick movement that still feels springy and characterful—snappy, but not rigid.

duration-slow.description: Playful motion (spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the playful motion slow curve for larger or more prominent movement transitions.

duration-fast.description: Playful motion (spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful motion fast curve for quick spatial transitions that should still feel expressive.

duration-fast.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful effects fast curve for subtle, quick visual updates.

default.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) default duration. Pairs with the playful effects default curve for common fades and visual effect transitions.

slow.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the playful effects slow curve for more noticeable fades or effect changes.

fast.description: Playful effects (non-spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful effects fast curve for subtle, quick visual updates.

motion-function-default.description: Calm motion (spatial) timing curve. Use for movement and layout-related transitions when you want a standard, stable feel with minimal flourish.

motion-function-slow.description: Calm motion (spatial) timing curve for slow movement. The curve is consistent across speeds; use the slow duration to make the transition feel more deliberate.

motion-function-fast.description: Calm motion (spatial) timing curve for fast movement. The curve is consistent across speeds; use the fast duration for snappier, standard motion.

motion-duration-default.description: Calm motion (spatial) default duration. Pairs with the calm motion curve for common movement transitions.

motion-duration-slow.description: Calm motion (spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the calm motion curve for larger or more prominent movement transitions that should feel steady and unhurried.

motion-duration-fast.description: Calm motion (spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the calm motion curve for quick, standard movement transitions.

fx-function-default.description: Calm effects (non-spatial) default timing curve. Use for opacity, color, shadow, blur, and other visual effects where overshoot is not appropriate.

fx-function-slow.description: Calm effects (non-spatial) slow timing curve. Use for slower fades and effect changes that should feel smooth and restrained.

fx-function-fast.description: Calm effects (non-spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick effect transitions that should feel responsive without drawing attention.

fx-duration-default.description: Calm effects (non-spatial) default duration. Pairs with the calm effects default curve for common fades and visual effect transitions.

fx-duration-slow.description: Calm effects (non-spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the calm effects slow curve for more noticeable fades or effect changes.

fx-duration-fast.description: Calm effects (non-spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the calm effects fast curve for subtle, quick visual updates.
